# services.quake3-server

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.quake3-server`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.quake3-server.baseq3` | `package or absolute path` | Path to the baseq3 files (pak\*.pk3). If this is on the nix store (type = package) all .pk3 files should be saved in the top-level directory. If this is on another filesystem (e.g /var/lib/baseq3) the .pk3 files are searched in $baseq3/.q3a/baseq3/ |
| `services.quake3-server.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Quake 3 dedicated server. |
| `services.quake3-server.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Extra configuration options. Note that options changed via RCON will not be persisted. To list all possible options, use "cvarlist 1" via RCON. |
| `services.quake3-server.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Open the firewall. |
| `services.quake3-server.package` | `package` | The ioquake3 package to use. |
| `services.quake3-server.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | UDP Port the server should listen on. |
